prerequisites: An active Kissmetrics account at https://app.kissmetrics.io/
Your Kissmetrics API key, supplied to the connector's required `username` field
If running on Airbyte Cloud and your organization restricts access by IP, allowlist the Airbyte Cloud IP addresses in your security settings

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic authentication
authMethods.summary: The Kissmetrics source authenticates with HTTP Basic authentication. Supply your Kissmetrics API key in the required `username` field and leave the secret `password` field empty unless your account requires a password. The `password` field is the only secret value in the configuration.

setupSteps.title: Obtain your Kissmetrics API key
setupSteps.body: Get the API key for your Kissmetrics account at https://app.kissmetrics.io/. The connector authenticates with HTTP Basic authentication using this key.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector username
setupSteps.body: Enter your Kissmetrics API key in the required `username` field.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector password
setupSteps.body: The `password` field is optional and secret. Leave it empty unless your Kissmetrics account requires a password; any value you enter is stored as a secret.

setupSteps.title: Verify network access (Airbyte Cloud only)
setupSteps.body: If your organization restricts access by IP, allowlist the Airbyte Cloud IP addresses in your security settings so the connector can reach the Kissmetrics API.
